nasb.text: And He *said to them, “Whoever divorces his wife and marries another woman commits adultery against her;

esv.text: And he said to them, “Whoever divorces his wife and marries another commits adultery against her,

cnv.text: 他對他們說：“誰休妻另娶，誰就是犯姦淫，得罪了妻子。

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“任何人休妻另娶，就是对妻子不忠，是犯通奸罪。

csbs.text: 耶稣就说：“如果有人休妻，另娶别人，就是犯通奸罪触犯妻子。
